items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Selwyn Forrester was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

· In honor of #NationalPoliceWeek, please join us in thanking all our law enforcement brothers and sisters who have dedicated their lives to keeping our communities safe by serving, protecting, and upholding the law.

· May 11 Free car seat checks are underway across PA! Our certified technicians inspect child passenger safety seats for suitability, check for recalls, and perform installations. Find an event near you, from May 11-31, at http:// bit.ly/PSPchildseat.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 10 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Leehsia Reeves was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 10 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Charles Pelzer was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

· May 8 Community Awareness Bulletin 01-2026: Scams Associated with Major Events. View the PDF at http:// bit.ly/PSP-CAB126. Community Awareness Bulletins examine emerging crime trends and safety issues.
